cinematic.label: Cinematic
cinematic.description: Classic teal & orange film style. Warm skin tones, cool shadows, tamed highlights.

warm.label: Warm
warm.description: Golden hour feel. Warm tones, soft shadows, high vibrance.

dreamy.label: Dreamy
dreamy.description: Soft, ethereal and hazy. Strongly lifted shadows, reduced contrast, desaturated.

moody.label: Moody
moody.description: Dark and dramatic. High contrast, deep blacks, cool tone.

vintage.label: Vintage
vintage.description: Analog film style. Faded blacks, muted colors, warm midtones.

natural.label: Natural
natural.description: Clean and true-to-life. Minimal adjustments, slight vibrance boost.

nordic.label: Nordic
nordic.description: Cool, bright and Scandinavian. Low saturation, cool temperature, soft contrast.

neon.label: Neon
neon.description: Cyberpunk style. High saturation, high contrast, cool tone, deep blacks.

matte.label: Matte
matte.description: Flat, faded indie film look. Heavily lifted blacks, reduced contrast, muted tones.

bleach_bypass.label: Bleach Bypass
bleach_bypass.description: Classic darkroom technique. Skips the bleach step — high contrast, silvery, heavily desaturated.

golden_film.label: Golden Film
golden_film.description: Kodak Portra inspired. Warm, rich and slightly lifted shadows. Great for portraits.

blue_hour.label: Blue Hour
blue_hour.description: Twilight and dusk atmosphere. Cool blue-purple tones, lifted shadows, soft contrast.

desert.label: Desert
desert.description: Dry, dusty and sun-baked. Very warm temperature, boosted oranges, high contrast.

tokyo_night.label: Tokyo Night
tokyo_night.description: City lights at night. High saturation, deep blacks, mix of warm highlights and cool shadows.

matrix_green.label: Matrix Green
matrix_green.description: Iconic Matrix color grade. Strong green cast, desaturated, high contrast with deep blacks. Everything inside the simulation.

western.label: Western
western.description: Spaghetti western inspired. Warm dusty palette, boosted yellows and oranges, high contrast with deep shadows. Think Leone.
